response.original_title: ポケモン feat. 初音ミク VOLTAGE Live
response.overview: VOLTAGE Live! is a collaborative concert held by Crypton Future Media and The Pokémon Company. Announced on the second anniversary of the Project VOLTAGE series' start, this combined third-dimensional live concert was held at the LaLa arena TOKYO-BAY in Funabashi City from March 20 to March 22, 2026. The concert featured all of the Project VOLTAGE songs that have been uploaded online. In addition to all of the Piapro Characters performing, Kasane Teto also performed as a special guest. A number of Pokémon, including Pikachu and Meloetta, also made guest appearances in most of the songs. The event's main visual was illustrated by Take.
response.title: Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku VOLTAGE Live!

results.name: 【公式】「ポケモン feat. 初音ミク VOLTAGE Live！」ポケミクライブ開催決定！
